docs.name: Word Rotate
docs.description: A list of words that cycle with slide, flip, or fade transitions — the signature hero-headline effect used across modern SaaS sites.

props.name: words
props.description: Array of words to cycle through.

props.name: interval
props.description: How long each word is shown in ms.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes (font size, colour, etc.).

docs.overview: WordRotate cycles through an array of words with configurable entrance and exit animations — slide, flip, or fade. Drop it inline within headings to convey multiple ideas without extra layout space.

scenarios.title: Hero headline value rotator
scenarios.description: Cycle through your product's core benefits inline inside a headline.

scenarios.title: Feature list rotator with flip
scenarios.description: Use the flip animation for a more dramatic 3-D card-turning effect.

scenarios.title: Subtle fade rotator in body copy
scenarios.description: Use the fade animation for a soft, unobtrusive rotation inside a paragraph.
